# anthropic_usage_report (Data Source)

Fetches the Messages usage report from the Anthropic Admin API. Returns one or more time buckets with token, cache, and tool-use counts. Suitable as input to FinOps/observability pipelines.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Daily token usage for the last 7 days, broken down by workspace and model.
data "anthropic_usage_report" "last_week" {
  starting_at  = formatdate("YYYY-MM-DD'T'00:00:00'Z'", timeadd(timestamp(), "-168h"))
  bucket_width = "1d"
  group_by     = ["workspace_id", "model"]
}

output "total_output_tokens" {
  value = sum(flatten([
    for b in data.anthropic_usage_report.last_week.buckets : [
      for r in b.results : r.output_tokens
    ]
  ]))
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `starting_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp; buckets starting at or after this are returned.

### Optional

- `account_ids` (List of String)
- `api_key_ids` (List of String)
- `bucket_width` (String) 1m, 1h, or 1d (default 1d).
- `context_window` (List of String)
- `ending_at` (String)
- `group_by` (List of String)
- `inference_geos` (List of String)
- `limit` (Number)
- `models` (List of String)
- `page` (String) next_page token from a prior response.
- `service_account_ids` (List of String)
- `service_tiers` (List of String)
- `speeds` (List of String)
- `workspace_ids` (List of String)

### Read-Only

- `buckets` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--buckets))
- `has_more` (Boolean)
- `next_page` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--buckets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `buckets`

Read-Only:

- `ending_at` (String)
- `results` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--buckets--results))
- `starting_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--buckets--results"></a>
### Nested Schema for `buckets.results`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String)
- `api_key_id` (String)
- `cache_creation_1h_input_tokens` (Number)
- `cache_creation_5m_input_tokens` (Number)
- `cache_read_input_tokens` (Number)
- `context_window` (String)
- `inference_geo` (String)
- `model` (String)
- `output_tokens` (Number)
- `service_account_id` (String)
- `service_tier` (String)
- `uncached_input_tokens` (Number)
- `web_search_requests` (Number)
- `workspace_id` (String)
